review_content.Placements: The campus placements are not too good. In my opinion, I think the placement rate of batch 2021-22 was 55-60%. It is really a great pharmacy college. Not many companies have visited here for placements.

reviews_list.review_title: Students can enjoy college life and studies as well.

review_content.Placements: Many companies visit our college and take an interview, then eligible students were selected. There were almost 100% of placements in this college. In the previous year, the M.Ed plus company visited our college and select the students in their company. The average salary offered was Rs 25,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college hostel was available with free Wi-Fi, study room, and each student had a separate compartment. On the right side of college, the canteen was available with good facilitates, and a digital classroom was also provided, and all teachers teach on a digital blackboard.

individual_reviews.title: I think you should take admission in this college. It's good for you.

content.Placements: The campus placements are not too good. In my opinion, I think the placement rate of batch 2021-22 was 55-60%. It is really a great pharmacy college. Not many companies have visited here for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are also good. They provide us all the facilities like library, canteen, classrooms, etc. There is good quality of hostel. This college is very clean and green. The students are good. Teachers are helpful for all the subjects.
content.Faculty: Teachers take regular lectures. They always try to help every student. I have learned many things about medical field in this course. They always provide us notes and guidance. They clear our vision about pharma field. I have improved my skills in pharmacy.

individual_reviews.title: Students can enjoy college life and studies as well.

content.Placements: Many companies visit our college and take an interview, then eligible students were selected. There were almost 100% of placements in this college. In the previous year, the M.Ed plus company visited our college and select the students in their company. The average salary offered was Rs 25,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel was available with free Wi-Fi, study room, and each student had a separate compartment. On the right side of college, the canteen was available with good facilitates, and a digital classroom was also provided, and all teachers teach on a digital blackboard.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Pros and cons of life at GMC Konni.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course, which is MBBS, are those who have scored high in the NEET entrance exam. So, out of some 15-20 lakh students attending the exam, only 18-20 thousand students get admission. Then, again, there are different quotas where the cut-off can vary. The placement chance is almost 90% as our country requires more and more doctors every day. As this is a government college, we are provided with a 1-year internship with a stipend of Rs. 22,000- Rs. 23,000 where the molding of students into doctors takes place. The lowest salary package one can be offered ranges from Rs. 30,000- Rs. 35,000, and the highest salary package offered can vary from Rs. 50,000- Rs. 65,000. With a PG and some experience, the salary can drastically increase. Top recruiting hospitals are those with prolonged working experience and a high number of in- and out-patients. The internship is provided at our own hospital, and all the students who have passed the final year with 50% marks can participate in the internship. Top roles are that of a junior resident, physician, medical officer, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Konni.

review_content.Placements: Since the course is MBBS, everyone who passes out could work in casualty and emergency departments; most of them go for MD and MS for government placements and a good salary. Since the 2022 batch is the first batch who are undergoing their 2nd year, we should wait 3 more years to see placement .
review_content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure, it is excellent. Academic blocks have spacious lecture halls and labs. Even though we have a good library with lots of books, it is still less accessed due to staff shortages, but it does affect our academic hostel, which is new, fully furnished, and luxurious, even being under government .

reviews_list.review_title: Really a good medical college.

review_content.Placements: 100 students are allotted per batch. Situated in the midst of many mountains, the most important thing to enjoy here is the scenic beauty that you wake up to every morning. The classes are excellent, with excellent faculty and facilities who are always there for any of our problems.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels are new and very well furnished, with full facilities. The rooms are spacious, with three in a room. The academic block also has all the facilities for our course. There is a big library on two floors, which is very spacious and refreshing.

individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of life at GMC Konni.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course, which is MBBS, are those who have scored high in the NEET entrance exam. So, out of some 15-20 lakh students attending the exam, only 18-20 thousand students get admission. Then, again, there are different quotas where the cut-off can vary. The placement chance is almost 90% as our country requires more and more doctors every day. As this is a government college, we are provided with a 1-year internship with a stipend of Rs. 22,000- Rs. 23,000 where the molding of students into doctors takes place. The lowest salary package one can be offered ranges from Rs. 30,000- Rs. 35,000, and the highest salary package offered can vary from Rs. 50,000- Rs. 65,000. With a PG and some experience, the salary can drastically increase. Top recruiting hospitals are those with prolonged working experience and a high number of in- and out-patients. The internship is provided at our own hospital, and all the students who have passed the final year with 50% marks can participate in the internship. Top roles are that of a junior resident, physician, medical officer, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Konni.

content.Placements: Since the course is MBBS, everyone who passes out could work in casualty and emergency departments; most of them go for MD and MS for government placements and a good salary. Since the 2022 batch is the first batch who are undergoing their 2nd year, we should wait 3 more years to see placement .
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure, it is excellent. Academic blocks have spacious lecture halls and labs. Even though we have a good library with lots of books, it is still less accessed due to staff shortages, but it does affect our academic hostel, which is new, fully furnished, and luxurious, even being under government .

individual_reviews.title: Really a good medical college.

content.Placements: 100 students are allotted per batch. Situated in the midst of many mountains, the most important thing to enjoy here is the scenic beauty that you wake up to every morning. The classes are excellent, with excellent faculty and facilities who are always there for any of our problems.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are new and very well furnished, with full facilities. The rooms are spacious, with three in a room. The academic block also has all the facilities for our course. There is a big library on two floors, which is very spacious and refreshing.

college_info.college_name: Children's University

highlights.summary:
Children's University is a state owned research University located at Gandhinagar, Gujarat. It was founded by Narendra Modi (then Chief Minister of Gujarat) under Children's University Act, 2009 with the aim to conduct research in areas of overall development of children. The University is UGC approved and offers degree / diploma / certificate courses at PG and PhD level in English and Gujarati medium. The University conducts research, education, training and extension services for creating right environment and systems to facilitate development of children.

The University offers degree / diploma / certificate courses such as MPhil, MA, MSc and PG Diploma at PG and PhD level. Details related to application process, eligibility and selection criteria is listed below:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates seeking admission in PG courses does not require entrance exam score for admission. Children's University offers admission to PG courses based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Admission to PhD programme is entrance-based. Aspirants must pass UGC-NET, UGC CSIR NET, NET-JRF or GSET for PhD admission. The university also conducts CRU PET for candidates without any entrance exam score.

However,  60% is a decent score and aspirants with this score in graduation or PG degree can get admission provided they also fulfil the selection requirements.

Besides, aspirants with UGC-NET, UGC CSIR-NET, GSET, etc. for admission. Aspirants can also appear for CRU PET conducted by the university.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it’s good, not that bad, but before joining, just ask anyone studying in this college.

review_content.Placements: Overall, my college has good infrastructure and recruitment opportunities in pharmaceutical industries and companies. review_content.Faculty: Exams are conducted in a good way. Our teachers provide good knowledge.
review_content.Other: Our college has good value for money. Our college needs many improvements. Fests and events are conducted decently. Our college conducts good activities. It provides scholarships.

review_summary.college_name: Goutham College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The college has knowledgeable staff and good placements.

content.Placements: 50% of the students were placed, with salaries ranging from Rs. 80,000 to 1.5 LPA. The institutions offering placements included Manipal Hospital, Narayana Hospital, Spandan Hospital, Victoria Hospital, and Government Hospital 99 in Yeshwantpur and Narayana Hrudayalaya. We secured internships and postings as senior staff nurses.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is equipped with labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel was clean, and the food quality was good, matching our cultural preferences. Medical facilities were readily available, as it is a nursing college, and various types of labs were present, including an Obstetrics and Gynecology lab and a medical-surgical nursing lab. Sports events are conducted annually.

individual_reviews.title: Not that much good environment of college campus but college teachers are very helpful.

content.Placements: Not that much good. Very low percentage of students get placement opportunities. But they give 100% internships for 6 months. 3 to 4 companies are interested to take freshers. As a stuff nurse, you may start a job in the corporate hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The boys' hostel is a dump of dustbin. The food quality is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi. The college is very good. There is no canteen in our college. Labs are good but they practice old technology. Yearly once, the college conducts annual sports.

content.Placements: For placements, students have to go through a 6-month compulsory internship. It has industry exposure, to convert students into professionals. reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are many seminar halls, classrooms with AC and Wi-Fi, and teachers have their own personal cabins. There are boardrooms for meetings with teachers and different boardrooms for student meetings, as well as discussion rooms for students. The library is very big with three floors filled with many books and articles. Hostel facilities, food in the canteen, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college placements are below average.
reviews.review_text: Every Wednesday college organises various extracurriculars, sports activities, seminars, industry talks, etc. College has computer labs and a library. They don't have their hostels but are connected with a private hostel. Hostel has a good infrastructure and good security system. They provide hostels separately in different areas. Hostel has a good mess where there are different menus for different days and they change the menu weekly.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good because it is situated on the roadside and feels congested. The college has all the other things like CCTV, security guards, Wi-Fi enabled campus, air-conditioned classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the top business school in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The college has a beautiful infrastructure. It can be visible from the road. The college is located on the roadside, and when I came to visit the college, the first thing that attracted me is its campus. The college has a hostel facility nearby at a walkable distance from the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an ideal college for good higher studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college is updated with the latest technologies inside the campus, like CCV in all corners of the campus and security guards. There is Wi-Fi included on the campus and in classrooms. Our classrooms are attached with air-conditioners, and the classroom is a smart class. I think they are now more updated on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a heritage of education and experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostels and college infrastructure are good. They are all well maintained by the college. During our college time, the maintenance of the hostel and college was done yearly, like painting and other work. The hostel needs to improve a little bit because we don't like the infrastructure, especially since the rooms are very small in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Those who are looking for placements after studies should definitely choose this college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, both the hostels and college buildings are very neat and clean. The campus of the college is very big and protected by CCTV and security guards. The college hostel is very near by only, just walkable distance from campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to take PGDM .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good and every class room is enabled with Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are fully smart class. The college hostel is very near to college, it's just walkable distance only. The college hostel provides both veg and non veg meals to students as per their requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Asia Pacific has been a great college in terms of  faculty, infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Although the infrastructure of our college is mediocre, it has an astonishing library. The college is digitally competent in providing classrooms and lecture facilities. There are 2 auditoriums and 5-6 seminar halls in the campus. The canteen is on the 8th floor, and it provides all the necessary food and snacks. The college has 2 hostels with shared room facilities and furnished with internet services as well. Both A/C and non-A/C rooms are available in the hostels so that the students can choo...

reviews.review_heading: A good college for management aspirants.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled campus, classrooms, labs, and library are available in the college. The classrooms have laptop and projectors. The canteen is on the rooftop and quality of food available is good. Hostels are around 1 kilometre away from campus, and there are separate hostels for girls and boys. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: A perfect top B-School of India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basic which is expected from a B-School. There is no Wi-Fi in the campus, the labs are functional with a good standard of software and hardware, the classrooms are air conditioned, sports facilities are available in the nearby sports complex. Canteen is well stocked and healthy thaali is available. Hostel is available for boys and girls separately and the rooms are big enough for two sharing basis. No issues regarding the infrastructure we're or are being faced by me.

reviews.review_heading: This is my dream college. My career and cherishable life in APIM are good.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. There is a three-floored fully air-conditioned and enormous library with all the latest books. Both indoor and outdoor games are available for students on the campus. There is a great auditorium for special events. The quality of food is good at the low price.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure of the college.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, the college is very good. All facilities are provided, and cleanliness is taken care of. The library is an add-on to the infrastructure where you can sit with your friends and work on all your assignments. Classrooms are a bit boring in terms of amenities where you don't have mics for presentations. In short space, there is a beautifully structured building with the best part, i.e. Indian flag. Computer labs are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Overall this is not a college which can help you shape your career and you should try somewhere else
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but for 1st year students only, it means that when you get promoted to 2nd year then you will be shifted to 2nd floor and that is worse, like the AC doesn't work and the toilets are very dirty and there are no lights in the corridor even.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with everything. The faculty, college, infrastructure, and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is good, and even I think one of the best in Delhi NCR. We have a canteen on the 8th floor. There are a three-story library and three computer labs on the campus. There is a medical room and sports room. The whole campus is well-equipped with the A/C and enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but not that great as many colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good but not excellent. Almost 70%-80% of students get placed every year. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Companies like Amazon, Wipro, etc., visited the campus for placements. There is a placement cell. It is efficient and helpful. A ragging cell is also available on the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Amenities like Wi-Fi, labs, medical, sports and many more are available in our college. The food served in the mess is wonderful. The food served in the canteen is excellent. The sports facility is not that good as compared to other colleges. Overall the infrastructure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college is quite good and helpful in all sectors.

review_content.Placements: Our college has faced many treats earlier, but since the change of our principal, around 3 companies are visiting the campus to conduct placement drives. Many of our college students were offered jobs. The college offers placement opportunities for almost all students. Although the salary package is low, you'll surely get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Although our classrooms are not up to the mark, they are manageable. Almost all the classrooms are air-conditioned. Hostel rooms are good but are still not up to the mark. I am a sports person, so I must say that the college fulfils every need of a sports enthusiast. I'm very happy with the sports facilities offered here. I think the college needs to improve its classrooms, considering the facilities that its competitors have been offering.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: LCET - Ludhiana College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good and supportive teachers.

content.Placements: Roles like full stack developer, app development, frontend developer, backend developer, data science, and web development are offered here. Sometimes many python based companies also came for hiring and offered their job roles. Overall, it is a good college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: I do not know about the hostel because I live near the college and I can go to my home easily after college. The canteen is average. Many sports activities are conducted in the college, and it is good.
content.Faculty: Semester exams in the college are based on your study. If you study more then you can easily pass the exams. You have to score above 60% to pass the semester. Exams are conducted in a good manner in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching faculty, Moderate fee structure, not satisfying hostel facilities.

content.Placements: In my course there were around 50 students in our computer Science batch and out of them roughly 50% got placed. The average salary offered was 15k pm while the highest offered was 25k pm. The roles which they were given were regarding developers in Java, html and etc. Most of the students got internship offers from companies in Chandigarh.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about the infrastructure, the classes were big and well maintained. review_summary.college_name: St Anne's Degree College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College with the best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 60 students got placed in the course. IBM, Concentrix, HCL, Cognizant, Suzuki, Infotec, Infosys, and Amazon visit the college. Around 25-30 students got placed in good companies. Marketing, computer programs, management programs, banking, and corporate opportunities are provided.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with the best facilities. There are Wi-Fi, labs, and neat classrooms. There is the best library. A lot of activities are held. We have the best canteen and the best food. They provide clean and healthy food. There are no junk food items. There is a clean environment. A lot of games and sports activities are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Psychology, Rehabilitation Science, Sociology) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average satisfaction because of faculty, placement, internships and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement is not good in the B.Sc. rehabilitation science, psychology, and sociology department; according to my knowledge, there is 0 placement, but other departments like B.Com. and BCA have average placement. Students from abroad join our college too; it's really a good opportunity to explore and learn a lot.
content.Infrastructure: Honesty, I wish I could give 0 stars. There are CCTV's everywhere, and the library has course books and novels that are very useful. Other than that, nothing is good about this college. I've been to the lab only in the 1st year; after that, they don't take us to the lab, and practical exposure is very poor. There is NO HOSTEL, and the canteen is affordable, and timings have to be followed. The quality of the food is above average. One very good quality of this college is they help students who need help with the midday meal program (school block as well as college block).

individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: I am a B.Com student studying at St. Anne's degree college for women. In this college lecturer's explanations are good, and everyone got a good percentage till 96% and more. Many students are recruited by top companies like Amazon, Google, Flipcard, etc. Most of the students got well placed in companies like Amazon, Google, and very well top companies, and the fees structure is affordable to everyone.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, and there offer many courses like B.Com, BBA, and B.A. B.Sc., B.Sc. , rehab, B.A. in psychology, journalism, etc. The college consists of a library, Wi-Fi labs, and classrooms, and Wi-Fi is not provided to students, and it is only for staff members or lecturers. There is a canteen where all foods are available at an affordable price. There are sports rooms, games, medical facilities, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Overall satisfied with good faculty, placements, excellent infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are good. There are a number of companies which recruit students from this college in order to give good future to their students. Top companies hire students to their companies, such as TCS, Accenture, Cognizant, etc. The highest packages offered are almost around 25k.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was almost satisfied. The classrooms, toilets, campus, overall are properly located with proper paintings. Classrooms are all filled with proper benches and desks. There is excellent library facilities and proper rooms are allocated for AV and presentations.

individual_reviews.title: St. Anne's Degree College for Women is the best college for women to study.

content.Placements: Above 80% of the students from our course got placed in various MNC companies. The salary package offered ranges between 1.8-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Amazon, Capgemini, Mphasis, Accenture, ICICI Prudential, etc., visit our campus for placements. We are upgraded with various skills to face the interview. Our college has a tie-up with many companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms and a library with lots of books. Our college does not provide hostel facility. Quality of the food served is very good in our canteen. Our college provides good medical facilities.

college_info.college_name: St Anne's Degree College Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The three colleges that are compared have similar BSc tuition fees. Candidates can have a look at the table below to compare there BBA tuition fees:

St. Annes Degree College for Women offers three scholarships for their students to choose from. SC/ST candidates can apply through the State Scholarship Portal to get a scholarship. Minority students can apply though the National Scholarship portal, and OBC candidates can apply through the OBC- Scholarship Portal.

St Anne's Degree College for Women fees has multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, one-time payment etc. The total tuition fee of the programme is INR 1.7 lakh. The tuition fees has to be paid over three years. The programme is divided into six semesters. Per semester cost for the programme is INR 28,300.
